svg.title: Repository architecture and governance framework
svg.desc: Three-layer diagram: Boundaries layer with domain modules, Governance layer with version/artifact/output controls, and Agent companion layer with reviewer, auditor, and scaffolder roles.

g.text: Each module owns its domain. No lateral imports.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What rules should a domain module follow for boundaries?')
sendPrompt('How should shared infrastructure be structured?')
sendPrompt('What belongs in a contracts or interfaces layer?')
sendPrompt('What should go in an entry points or adapters layer?')

g.text: Strict version control, artifact provenance, and centralized output structure.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How should I enforce strict semantic versioning in a messy repo?')
sendPrompt('How do I track artifact origin and provenance in a codebase?')
sendPrompt('What does a centralized output structure look like for a monorepo?')

g.text: LLM-assisted review, auditing, and scaffolding — triggered on demand or by CI hooks.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What should a boundary reviewer agent check for?')
sendPrompt('What should an artifact auditor agent check?')
sendPrompt('What should a scaffolder agent generate for new modules?')
